rag_rules: Place AGREE contracts in component type scopes for port-based assumptions and guarantees, and in implementation scopes for bindings.
Use annex agree blocks to contain AGREE syntax elements like assume, guarantee, eq, and assign.
generic_rules: Ensure all AGREE variables are grounded in visible AADL identifiers or explicit declarations.
Place component type contracts in type scopes and implementation-level bindings in implementation scopes.
Use visible feature names and constants in AGREE expressions when defining assumptions and guarantees.
Avoid encoding AADL properties as AGREE variables unless explicit typed ports or constants are available.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts must be enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks.
Assumptions and guarantees should reference valid component ports or variables in scope.
anti_patterns: Do not place implementation-level bindings in component type scopes.
Do not reference AADL properties like Deadline or Period as AGREE variables without explicit model exposure.
